title: linum suffruticosum subsp. differens
intro: Linum suffruticosum subsp. differens, also known as the dwarf flax or red-flowered dwarf flax, is a subspecies of the Linum suffruticosum plant, belonging to the family Linaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of linarin and other flavonoids. The health benefits associated with Linum suffruticosum subsp. differens include its potential to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to produce a medicinal tea, which can be used to treat various health issues.
